# EAM — Creative Digital Agency

> EAM is a creative digital agency founded in 2024 by three partners — Etame, Angoula and Mbosseu (the agency's name is their initials). EAM designs bespoke websites, business applications and search strategies (SEO & GEO) for SMEs, local businesses and founders across France, Morocco and francophone Africa. The studio works in French and English.

## About
- Founders: Etame, Angoula, Mbosseu (a team of 3)
- Founded: 2024
- Services: bespoke websites; business applications (dashboards, multi-tenant SaaS, PWAs); e-commerce; brand & visual identity; SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- Technologies: Next.js, React, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, PostgreSQL
- Languages: French (default), English
- Contact: eam.agency@gmail.com
- Area served: France, Morocco, francophone Africa, international

## What is GEO?
GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is optimizing a website so it is cited by AI answer engines such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Google's AI Overviews. EAM builds it into every project: structured data (schema.org), an llms.txt file, FAQ content with direct factual answers, and fast, server-rendered pages.

## Key pages
- Home (FR): https://eam.vercel.app/fr
- Home (EN): https://eam.vercel.app/en
- Work / portfolio: https://eam.vercel.app/fr/work
- Studio / about: https://eam.vercel.app/fr/about
- Contact: https://eam.vercel.app/fr/contact

## Selected projects
- Beldi Fusion — immersive site for a Moroccan fusion restaurant (Toulouse)
- Mon Boum — digital showcase for a 10-location halal fast-food chain (Toulouse)
- F2M Consulting — institutional site for a Qualiopi-certified training body
- La Brigade Mobile — rebuild of a phone-repair & refurbished-device platform
- KermHosting — SaaS hosting platform for francophone Africa (1,000+ users)
- ID SKILLZ — showcase site for a creative agency

## Notes
- Some internal and client tools are under NDA and are shown without live links or screenshots.
- Metrics shown in case studies are provisional pending client validation.
